mapper.sql: id, scan_task_id, bucket_name, object_key, data_type, data_level, data_count, data_sample, occurrence_position, risk_level, action_taken, created_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sensitive_data_detail WHERE scan_task_id = #{scanTaskId} ORDER BY data_level DESC, data_count DESC
SELECT FROM sensitive_data_detail WHERE data_type = #{dataType} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM sensitive_data_detail WHERE data_level = #{dataLevel} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM sensitive_data_detail WHERE risk_level = #{riskLevel} ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sensitive_data_detail ( scan_task_id, bucket_name, object_key, data_type, data_level, data_count, data_sample, occurrence_position, risk_level, action_taken ) VALUES
(#{item.scanTaskId}, #{item.bucketName}, #{item.objectKey}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.dataLevel}, #{item.dataCount}, #{item.dataSample}, #{item.occurrencePosition}, #{item.riskLevel}, #{item.actionTaken})
